Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.Configuration

Packages that use Configuration
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.cobol
Provides the interfaces for generic COBOL runtimes
com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.tools
Provides command-line tools and utilities for file system operations.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils
NIB Batch utilities
